name: Mid-Autumn Festival (Tết Trung Thu)
traditions: Children's lantern processions; lion dances; mooncake eating; star-shaped lanterns; unicorn dance performances.
historicalBackground: In Vietnam, the Mid-Autumn Festival is primarily a children's celebration, with legend saying parents use it to make up for time spent working during harvest.
description: Vietnam's enchanting Children's Festival, where cities glow with star lanterns and lion dances during the full autumn moon.
